werkzeug_ref.label: Werkzeug
werkzeug_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Werkzeugkatalog' with the id `69cad17fbc61d7b098886b2a` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69cad17fbc61d7b098886b2a/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

mitarbeiter_ref.label: Mitarbeiter
mitarbeiter_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Mitarbeiterverwaltung' with the id `69cad17797a950c659be4580` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69cad17797a950c659be4580/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

ausgabedatum.label: Ausgabedatum
ausgabedatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

geplante_rueckgabe.label: Geplantes Rückgabedatum
geplante_rueckgabe.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

projekt_baustelle.label: Projekt / Baustelle
projekt_baustelle.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

zustand_ausgabe.label: Zustand bei Ausgabe
zustand_ausgabe.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.
